name: agent-kernel
description: WASM-first simulation kernel built around the **Ports & Adapters** architectural pattern.

scripts.build:wasm: mkdir -p build && asc packages/core-as/assembly/index.ts -o build/core-as.wasm -t build/core-as.wat --sourceMap --optimize && mkdir -p packages/ui-web/assets && cp build/core-as.wasm packages/ui-web/assets/core-as.wasm
scripts.docs:pdf: mmdc -i WORKFLOW.md -o WORKFLOW-print.md --outputFormat svg && md-to-pdf WORKFLOW-print.md && rm -f WORKFLOW-print.md mermaid-*.svg
